body.title: curiosity-loop
body.result: learn_top_gap() added to learner.py — queries twm_observations NARRATIVE_GAP, queues to reading_list. PROC_CURIOSITY_DRAIN habit seeded (schedule=1800s). Fixed add_to_reading_list RL_WEB_ ID bug. Tested: gap inserted → RL_040 queued correctly.
body.description: Habit primitive chain: NE gap/wonder signal → threshold fires → learn queue entry. Igor self-directs learning without Python call or external prompt.
